name: Bot Crash Combat Arena
author: Poki
description: Enter the ultimate robot warzone in Bot Crash, where you build, upgrade, and crash your custom bots in explosive real-time PvP battles! Choose from powerful weapons, tough armor, and strategic gadgets to create the ultimate battle machine. Compete in action-packed arenas, earn rewards, and climb the global leaderboard. Whether you're a tactical fighter or a pure brawler, every match is a test of skill and strategy. Get ready to crash, clash, and conquer the arena in this high-octane robot combat game! How do I play Bot Crash? Use your mouse, the WASD, or arrow keys to play! Who created Bot Crash? Bot Crash is created by GeniGames. Play their other games on Poki: Pro Shooter , I Am Hall Security , Flying Wheels Evolution , Whip & Flip , and Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot ! How can I play Bot Crash for free? You can play Bot Crash for free on Poki. Can I play Bot Crash on mobile devices and desktop? Bot Crash can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
